title: ceratozamia mexicana
intro: Ceratozamia mexicana, also known as the Mexican cycad or pinoncillo, is a species of palm-like cycad that belongs to the family Zamiaceae. This plant is native to Mexico and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceratozamia mexicana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its seeds can also be crushed and used as a spice or added to traditional dishes in Mexican cuisine.
